name: QA 735
description:
PCP QA Test No. 735

Exercise the Linux proc.psinfo.cgroup and proc.id.container metrics



Copyright (c) 2013,2018 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora31 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 735

Exercise the Linux proc.psinfo.cgroup and proc.id.container metrics

Copyright (c) 2013,2018 Red Hat.

To reproduce this test in a container, please run:

./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora31 reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 735

Exercise the Linux proc.psinfo.cgroup and proc.id.container metrics



Copyright (c) 2013,2018 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora31 reproduce
